popularStory.headline: Robert Page, III and Lucy Warde
popularStory.description:
"Robert Page and Lucy Warde were married in Saint Marys the parish church of South Walsham, Norfolk, England." 

"Robert PAGE, age 33 and Lucy, age 30 passed examination April 11, 1637 to go to New En …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucia Warde於1604年3月13日出生在英國諾福爾可費爾比時，她的父親Francis Warde24歲，母親Susanah Browne24歲。她於1629年10月8日與Robert Page在英國諾福爾可素斯 瓦爾申馬 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1665年11月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓享年61歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucia Warde于1604年3月13日出生在英国諾福爾可費爾比时，她的父亲Francis Warde24岁，母亲Susanah Browne24岁。她于1629年10月8日与Robert Page在英国諾福爾可素斯 瓦爾申馬 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1665年11月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓享年61岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.
Oldest Grave seen in Memorials List

en.lifeSummary: When Lucia Warde was born on 13 March 1604, in Filby, Norfolk, England, her father, Francis Warde, was 24 and her mother, Susanah Browne, was 24. She married Robert Page on 8 October 1629, in South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 12 November 1665, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucia Warde est née le 13 mars 1604, à Filby, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Francis Warde, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Susanah Browne, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Page le 8 octobre 1629, à South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 novembre 1665, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucia Warde am 13. März 1604 in Filby, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Francis Warde 24 und ihre Mutter Susanah Browne 24. Sie hat am 8. Oktober 1629 in South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, England Robert Page geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. November 1665 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America und wurde in Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucia Warde è nata il il 13 marzo 1604 nel Filby, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Francis Warde, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Susanah Browne, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Robert Page il 8 ottobre 1629, nel South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 12 novembre 1665, nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucia Wardeが1604年3月13日にイギリスノーフォルクフィルビーで生まれた時，父Francis Wardeは24歳，母Susanah Browneは24歳であった。1629年10月8日にイギリスノーフォルクソウス ワルシャム スト マリーでRobert Pageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1665年11月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムハンプトンで61歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンピン グローブ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucia Warde(이)가 1604년 3월 13일 영국 노르폴크 피비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francis Warde(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susanah Browne(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1629년 10월 8일 영국 노르폴크 소우스 월샤 스트 메리에서 Robert Page(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1665년 11월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴 핀 그로브 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucia Warde nasceu em 13 de março de 1604, em Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Francis Warde, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Susanah Browne, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Page em 8 de outubro de 1629, em South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1665, em Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucia Warde родилась 13 марта 1604 г. в местности филби, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Francis Warde было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Susanah Browne, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Page 8 октября 1629 г. в местности соут валшам ст мэри, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 12 ноября 1665 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности паин гров кеметири, хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucia Warde nació el 13 de marzo de 1604, en Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Francis Warde, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Susanah Browne, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Robert Page el 8 de octubre de 1629, en South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1665, en Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
